objective:
Objectif de stratégie de trading:
"Pour le marché 0GUSDC en 1h, utiliser l'indicateur ROC ainsi que la combinaison EMA + OBV pour détecter des breakouts potentiels dans une tendance puissante. Filtrons les signaux avec un filtre de volatilité implicite (SL/TP) et gating par comportements aleatoires inverses (mode_inverse). Pour le risk management, nous utiliserons une stop loss basse pour minimiser les pertes si la tendance s'inverse brusquement. L'objectif de cette stratégie est d'atteindre un taux de rendement compris entre 20% et 40% par an, tout en réduisant le risque associé.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining the relative strength index (RSI), bollinger bands (BB) and average true range (ATR) with ATR-based stop loss/take profit will improve trading performance by identifying strong trending market conditions while managing risk effectively.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy is designed to identify strong trending market conditions while managing risk effectively by using relative strength index (RSI), bollinger bands (BB) and average true range (ATR). The entry long condition includes a close above the upper Bollinger band, RSI > 50 and ADX > 25. Exit criteria is when the closing price crosses the middle Bollinger band or the ADX falls below 20. Potential weaknesses include the possibility of false signals due to noise in the market data, and overfitting from using too many parameters. If results are poor (negative return), changing the entry signal by removing one of the conditions could be tested. For mediocre returns (low Sharpe ratio), adjusting stop loss or take profit levels may improve performance. If all else fails, a mean reversion strategy could be considered as an alternative approach.
[Backup plan] ['Try removing either RSI > 50 OR Bollinger upper condition to test for false signals caused by noise in the market data.', 'Consider testing different stop loss or take profit levels if returns are poor but with high Sharpe ratio.']

Utilizing ROC and EMA with Bollinger Bands, Donchian Channels and ATR to detect strong trends for potential breakouts; filtering with implicit volatility level (SL/TP) and random inverse behaviour.
